phrases.text_local: Recomende um restaurante de comida caseira perto daqui.
phrases.pronunciation: reh-koo-MAYNG-dih OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih DIH koo-MEE-duh kuh-ZAY-ruh PEHR-too duh-KEE.

likely_response.local: Pergunte no balcão de informações do museu; eles podem indicar restaurantes de comida caseira nas redondezas.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH DOO moo-ZEHOO; EH-lihsh PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tihsh DIH koo-MEE-duh kuh-ZAY-ruh NUHSH reh-doong-DEH-zuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the museum's information desk; they can recommend home-style restaurants nearby.

responses.english: Ask at the museum's information desk; they can recommend home-style restaurants nearby.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH DOO moo-ZEHOO; EH-lihsh PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tihsh DIH koo-MEE-duh kuh-ZAY-ruh NUHSH reh-doong-DEH-zuhsh.
responses.french: Pergunte no balcão de informações do museu; eles podem indicar restaurantes de comida caseira nas redondezas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket machine is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a máquina de bilhetes automática?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH MAH-kee-nuh DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh ow-too-MAH-tee-kuh?
phrases.cultural_note: The ticket machine is placed near the entrance for visitor convenience.

likely_response.translation_en: Ask the ticket clerk at the entrance.

responses.english: Ask the ticket clerk at the entrance.

likely_response.local: A loja de lembranças medieval fica no fundo do museu.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH LAW-zhuh DIH laymb-RAHNNG-suhsh meh-deeih-VAHL FEE-kuh NOO FOONNG-doo DOO moo-ZEHOO.
likely_response.translation_en: The medieval souvenir shop is at the back of the museum.

responses.english: The medieval souvenir shop is at the back of the museum.
responses.phonetic: AH LAW-zhuh DIH laymb-RAHNNG-suhsh meh-deeih-VAHL FEE-kuh NOO FOONNG-doo DOO moo-ZEHOO.
responses.french: A loja de lembranças medieval fica no fundo do museu.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket office is
phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a bilheteira do museu?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee POH-soo en-kon-TRAHR-ah (link R to next vowel) bee-yeh-TAY-rah doo moo-ZEH-oo
phrases.cultural_note: Ticket desks are conventionally placed near entrances for immediate visitor flow management.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica junto à entrada principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too AH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's right next to the main entrance.

responses.english: Good morning, it's right next to the main entrance.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too AH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.french: Bom dia, fica junto à entrada principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Sacred Art collection is
phrases.text_local: Poderia indicar o caminho para a Coleção de Arte Sacra?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-dih-REEUH een-dee-KAHR AW kuh-MEE-nyoo PUH-ruh AH koo-lih-SOWN DIH AH-ruh-tih SAHK-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Directions often reference floors and side orientations clearly to manage visitor flow efficiently.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Coleção de Arte Sacra.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH koo-lih-SOWN DIH AH-ruh-tih SAHK-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Sacred Art collection.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Sacred Art collection.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH koo-lih-SOWN DIH AH-ruh-tih SAHK-ruh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Coleção de Arte Sacra.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Roman Archaeology room is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Sala de Arqueologia Romana?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DIH uh-ruh-kihoo-loo-ZHEEUH roo-MAHN-nuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese museum staff typically give concise spatial directions using relative terms like ao fundo or à esquerda.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Sala de Arqueologia Romana.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH uh-ruh-kihoo-loo-ZHEEUH roo-MAHN-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Roman Archaeology Room.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Roman Archaeology Room.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH uh-ruh-kihoo-loo-ZHEEUH roo-MAHN-nuh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Sala de Arqueologia Romana.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the souvenir shop is
phrases.text_local: Onde está localizada a loja de souvenirs?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH loo-kuh-lee-ZAH-duh AH LAW-zhuh DIH soow-vih-NEE-ruhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Retail areas in Portuguese museums are typically positioned at the exit route to encourage browsing.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, encontra-se no fundo do edifício.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ayng-KOHNGT-ruh-SIH NOO FOONNG-doo DOO eh-dee-FEES-yoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's located at the back of the building.

responses.english: Good morning, it's located at the back of the building.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ayng-KOHNGT-ruh-SIH NOO FOONNG-doo DOO eh-dee-FEES-yoo.
responses.french: Bom dia, encontra-se no fundo do edifício.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso validar o meu cartão de entrada?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo vuh-lee-DAHR AW MEHOO kuh-ruh-TOWN DIH ayngt-RAH-duh?

likely_response.local: Dirija-se ao validador de cartão na porta ou ao balcão de informações para obter ajuda.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW vuh-lee-duh-DOHR DIH kuh-ruh-TOWN NUH PAW-ruh-tuh OHW OW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH PUH-ruh awb-TEHR uh-ZHOO-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the card validator at the door or ask at the information desk for assistance.

responses.english: Go to the card validator at the door or ask at the information desk for assistance.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW vuh-lee-duh-DOHR DIH kuh-ruh-TOWN NUH PAW-ruh-tuh OHW OW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH PUH-ruh awb-TEHR uh-ZHOO-duh.
responses.french: Dirija-se ao validador de cartão na porta ou ao balcão de informações para obter ajuda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the card validator is
phrases.text_local: Onde se situa o validador de cartão?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH see-TOOUH AW vuh-lee-duh-DOHR DIH kuh-ruh-TOWN?
phrases.cultural_note: Payment validation devices are strategically placed at entry points for seamless ticket checking.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, está fixado na porta de acesso.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH feek-SAH-doo NUH PAW-ruh-tuh DIH uh-SEH-soo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's mounted on the access door.

responses.english: Good morning, it's mounted on the access door.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH feek-SAH-doo NUH PAW-ruh-tuh DIH uh-SEH-soo.
responses.french: Bom dia, está fixado na porta de acesso.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Sacred Art Collection is
phrases.text_local: Onde posso visitar a Coleção de Arte Sacra?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo vee-zee-TAHR AH koo-lih-SOWN DIH AH-ruh-tih SAHK-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Collections are often grouped in specific halls named after their historical period or theme.

likely_response.translation_en: Ask the staff at the entrance.

responses.english: Ask the staff at the entrance.
